[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a black background graphic with large white text.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is stacked, bold white text reading multiple lines.

Setting:
The scene is entirely a graphic on a solid black background with no other visible elements.

Visual Details:
The typography is very large, blocky, and high-contrast in white, centered horizontally near the top and middle of the frame, with three lines of text arranged vertically. The font style appears irregular and pixelated, and the overall composition is simple with ample empty black space around the text.

Visible Text:
stiker 10
gw colong ya...
makasih!)

Practical Summary:
The image shows a black background with three lines of large white text. No other objects or graphics are visible besides the text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
